title: lithocarpus nebularum
intro: Lithocarpus nebularum, also known as the mountain bigleaf or cloud forest tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus nebularum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable treatment for various health conditions. Lithocarpus nebularum is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, with the leaves and bark being the primary parts used for herbal preparations.
